known_failures.detail: main-flows.html modified after most recent user-context capture; Founder workflow gate, not code regression

B.43 confirmed across both webkit + webkit-mobile (same browser engine, different viewport). Same 2-5 scenarios FAIL on both: S10 dismiss-deletes-read-items + S13 feed-action-row-integrity. Per CLAUDE.md memory project_b43_webkit_mobile_smoke_timing.md: intermittent webkit-engine-only flakes from timing fragility; not new code regressions; chromium + firefox engines unaffected.

known_failures.verdict: B.43 is engine-specific (webkit), not viewport-specific. Both webkit + webkit-mobile reproduce same 2 minimum failures (S10 + S13). Per Founder Packet Item 6: accept this categorized known-flake list OR block goal on webkit-engine fix.
